creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Frank,

I think we get enough info on questions@. Could you please rewrite the 
port to use those files in gzipped tarballs instead of those floppy 
images with the ext2 module? I can upload the tarball to the FreeBSD 
mirrors, just please add some info into the port about the location of 
the sources.

Thanks in advance,
Gabor
